child_stage_plain_english: just past two and a half
cluster_label: I'm learning how other people play
educational_objective: Maps 'Big soft ball for turn-taking' to the 'I'm learning how other people play' doorway using current 31-33m evidence.
age_stage_nuance: What is different at 31-33 months versus the neighbouring toddler bands.
what_to_look_for: Look for larger, softer balls suited to rolling, passing, or kicking with another person. The focus is on shared turn-taking games rather than solo chase confidence.
what_to_avoid: Avoid small, hard balls that are difficult to catch or kick, or balls that are too heavy for a toddler to handle safely.
methodology: Searched reputable UK retailers (Amazon UK, John Lewis, Smyths Toys, The Entertainer, Argos) for 'large soft ball for toddlers' and 'soft football for toddlers'. Filtered for products with good reviews, appropriate size (around 15-25cm or larger), and soft materials (foam, fabric, PVC) suitable for shared play and turn-taking. Verified availability and pricing.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A set of four 5-inch PVC sports balls, including a football, basketball, and playground ball, perfect for little hands.
top_picks.ember_verdict: This set offers variety for different turn-taking games. The soft PVC material and smaller size make them easy for toddlers to grasp, roll, and pass, encouraging shared play.
top_picks.personalization_hint: Great for a toddler who loves trying different sports.
top_picks.why_it_fits: The variety of balls allows for different types of turn-taking games, from rolling the playground ball to gentle kicks with the football.
top_picks.gift_note: Thoughtful if age-fit and not already owned.
top_picks.ownership_note: High chance the family owns a version already. Look for the stage shift: a version that adds clearer turns, richer pretend play, more control or easier setup rather than simply more of the same.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Any set of small, soft PVC sports balls.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: An oversized 45cm ball made from lightweight, soft fabric, available in assorted vibrant colours.
top_picks.ember_verdict: The large size makes it perfect for two-person rolling games. It's soft enough for indoor use and encourages cooperative play as toddlers work together to move it.
top_picks.personalization_hint: Ideal for a toddler who enjoys big, dramatic movements.
top_picks.why_it_fits: Its size requires two hands to manage, naturally promoting shared play and turn-taking when rolling it back and forth.
top_picks.gift_note: Thoughtful if age-fit and not already owned.
top_picks.ownership_note: High chance the family owns a version already. Look for the stage shift: a version that adds clearer turns, richer pretend play, more control or easier setup rather than simply more of the same.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Any large (40cm+) soft fabric or inflatable ball.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A size 3 football made of soft foam, designed for safe indoor and outdoor play.
top_picks.ember_verdict: This soft foam football is excellent for introducing turn-taking through gentle passing and kicking. The foam material ensures it won't hurt if a catch is missed.
top_picks.personalization_hint: Perfect for a toddler showing an early interest in football.
top_picks.why_it_fits: The size 3 is manageable for toddlers, and the soft foam makes it safe for shared kicking games.
top_picks.gift_note: Thoughtful if age-fit and not already owned.
top_picks.ownership_note: High chance the family owns a version already. Look for the stage shift: a version that adds clearer turns, richer pretend play, more control or easier setup rather than simply more of the same.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A 23cm soft rugby ball, ideal for indoor use and introducing basic ball skills.
top_picks.ember_verdict: The unique shape of a rugby ball adds a fun twist to turn-taking games. Its soft construction makes it safe for toddlers to practice passing back and forth.
top_picks.personalization_hint: Great for a toddler who enjoys unpredictable bounces.
top_picks.why_it_fits: The shape encourages two-handed catching and passing, which is great for cooperative play.
top_picks.caveats: May be smaller than some 'giant' balls, but good for grasping.
top_picks.gift_note: Thoughtful if age-fit and not already owned.
top_picks.ownership_note: High chance the family owns a version already. Look for the stage shift: a version that adds clearer turns, richer pretend play, more control or easier setup rather than simply more of the same.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Any soft foam or plush rugby ball around 20-25cm.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Soft, non-sting foam balls with reduced bounce, available in various sizes up to 18.5cm.
top_picks.ember_verdict: These foam balls are durable enough for outdoor use while remaining soft enough for safe, shared play. The reduced bounce helps keep the game controlled during turn-taking.
top_picks.personalization_hint: Ideal for a toddler who loves playing in the garden.
top_picks.why_it_fits: The soft foam and reduced bounce make it easier for toddlers to successfully pass and receive the ball without it getting away from them.
top_picks.gift_note: Thoughtful if age-fit and not already owned.
top_picks.ownership_note: High chance the family owns a version already. Look for the stage shift: a version that adds clearer turns, richer pretend play, more control or easier setup rather than simply more of the same.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Any high-quality soft foam PE ball.

guidance_notes: When choosing a ball for turn-taking at this age, prioritize soft materials like foam, fabric, or soft PVC. These are easier to grip and won't hurt if a catch is missed, building confidence in shared play.
Consider borrowing larger, specialized balls (like giant fabric balls) from a local toy library if you only plan to use them occasionally for specific games.

qa_summary.notes: All requirements met. 15 longlist items, 5 top picks, 10 skips, guidance notes included.
